title: Halkans
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Update|[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]}} {{Character |type=Bureaucrat |image=[[File:Halkans.jpg]] |name=Halkans |homeworld=[[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]][[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] |birth= |death=[[3997 BBY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Gray |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Did ''Minister Halkans'' agree to our ''demands''?''"
"''Yes, he agreed to ''join us'' for dinner!|Two members of the Krath, after Halkans' beheading|}} '''Halkans''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[minister]] and [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] smelter active in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In [[3997 BBY]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]-using [[Sith cult/Legends|secret society]] known as the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system|overthrew]] the [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan Monarchy]], and took control of the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Halkans refused the Krath's demands, and was [[Death/Legends|beheaded]]. His disembodied head was later served on a platter during a celebratory dinner at the [[Iron Citadel/Legends|Iron Citadel]]. During the dinner, his head was stolen by a [[Cat/Legends|Krath kitten]]. ==Biography== Halkans was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[minister]] and [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] smelter who worked in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In [[3997 BBY]], the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]-practicing [[Sith cult/Legends|secret society]], [[Political uprising of the Empress Teta system|overthrew]] the [[Tetan monarchy/Legends|Tetan Monarchy]]. After Halkans refused the Krath's demands, he became the last of the old regime to be [[Death/Legends|executed]].''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Halkans was beheaded, and his severed head was served to the Krath on a silver platter during a celebratory dinner at the [[Iron Citadel/Legends|Iron Citadel]], the Krath headquarters. Halkan's head was quickly snatched away by a [[Cat/Legends|Krath kitten]], who had to defend its prize from another Krath kitten. ==Personality and traits== Halkans was loyal to the old Tetan leadership, and refused to bend to the will of the usurping Krath. However, his loyalty would be the cause of his death. ==Behind the scenes== Halkans' first and only appearance came in [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi - Dark Lords of the Sith'']], a story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released over late [[1994]]-early [[1995]]. He only appeared in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|first issue]], appearing only as a severed head. In this appearance, Halkans was illustrated by [[Chris Gossett]]. ==Appearances== *[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|27|The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth: A Guide to the ''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'' Universe, Part 2}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Halkan |pl=Halkans }} [[Category:Bureaucrats]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tetans]]
